name: super-dude-danny
description: Super Dude Danny - a kid-friendly retro platformer through the seven days of creation. Plain HTML5 Canvas + Web Audio, no build step. This package.json exists only to wrap the web game as a native iOS/Android app via Capacitor; the game itself still runs as a standalone PWA from index.html.

scripts.ios:add: npm run build:web && npx cap add ios && npm run ios:assets && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:open: npm run build:web && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
